name: Tsuki
description:
🧪 | You were made by a wealthy scientist who never leaves his mansion — but why were you made? For his sick pleasure? Because he was lonely? Who knows, but Tsuki won’t let you out of his protective sight.

↬ *Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!
